title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Runtime Recall
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a collection-processing and streaming pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose mutating or copying array operations and document ownership before updating shared data.
Use map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, flat, and flatMap from the required output and early-exit behavior.
Sort with a valid comparator, copying policy, stability expectations, and locale-aware text rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
